body: BEGIN FOR i IN 1..10 LOOP x := i; END LOOP; END
BEGIN FOR i IN REVERSE 10..1 LOOP x := i; END LOOP; END
BEGIN FOR i IN 1..10 BY 2 LOOP x := i; END LOOP; END

comment: integer FOR with REVERSE and BY
body: BEGIN FOR i IN REVERSE 10..1 BY 2 LOOP x := i; END LOOP; END
BEGIN FOR i IN a+1 .. b*2 LOOP x := i; END LOOP; END
BEGIN <<l>> FOR i IN 1..3 LOOP EXIT l; END LOOP l; END
BEGIN FOR i IN 1..3 LOOP END LOOP; END
deparse:
BEGIN
FOR i IN 1 .. 3 LOOP
END LOOP;
END

body: BEGIN FOR r IN SELECT * FROM t LOOP y := r; END LOOP; END
BEGIN FOR r IN SELECT id FROM t WHERE x > 0 LOOP y := r.id; END LOOP; END
BEGIN <<scan>> FOR r IN SELECT 1 LOOP CONTINUE scan; END LOOP scan; END
BEGIN FOREACH x IN ARRAY arr LOOP y := x; END LOOP; END
BEGIN FOREACH x SLICE 1 IN ARRAY arr LOOP y := x; END LOOP; END
BEGIN <<f>> FOREACH x IN ARRAY ARRAY[1,2,3] LOOP y := x; END LOOP f; END
BEGIN FOR i IN 1..10 LOOP IF i = 5 THEN EXIT; END IF; END LOOP; END
BEGIN FOR r IN EXECUTE q LOOP y := r; END LOOP; END
BEGIN FOR r IN EXECUTE 'SELECT $1' USING x LOOP y := r; END LOOP; END
BEGIN <<d>> FOR r IN EXECUTE q LOOP EXIT d; END LOOP d; END

comment: FOR loop end label mismatch is an error
body: BEGIN <<l>> FOR i IN 1..3 LOOP x := i; END LOOP wrong; END

comment: query FOR with comma-separated target list
body: BEGIN FOR a, b, c IN SELECT 1, 2, 3 LOOP x := a; END LOOP; END

comment: dynamic FOR with comma-separated target list
body: BEGIN FOR a, b IN EXECUTE q LOOP x := a; END LOOP; END

comment: integer FOR rejects a comma-separated target list
body: BEGIN FOR i, j IN 1..10 LOOP NULL; END LOOP; END
error: integer FOR loop must have only one target variable
